issues.sample: On several occasions while vehicle was stationary at a stoplight or moving very slowly the emergency braking system deployed, with seat belt tensioner activated and brakes applied with characteristic thunk sound.  I could discern no threat at the time, but other cars were nearby.

narrative.headline: What 2021 Audi A4 Allroad owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Forward Collision Avoidance (100% of reports).

issues.sample: On several occasions while vehicle was stationary at a stoplight or moving very slowly the emergency braking system deployed, with seat belt tensioner activated and brakes applied with characteristic thunk sound.  I could discern no threat at the time, but other cars were nearby.
issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
